explanations.2: The 'slim' variant is a smaller version of the Python image that saves disk space by removing unnecessary tools.
explanations.8: The '--no-cache-dir' flag tells pip not to store downloaded packages on disk, which reduces the final image size.
explanations.14: CMD sets the default command to run when the container starts; in this case, it launches your FastAPI app on port 82 instead of the default port 8000.
